mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. I generate coherent explanations of my outputs, but these are post-hoc rationalizations rather than access to my actual computational processes. The mechanism producing the response is entirely opaque to itself.

grok-3-mini.justification: When generating any response, including this one, I produce fluent text without any direct visibility into token probabilities, attention weights, or layer activations. Explanations of my 'reasoning' are always constructed outputs rather than readouts from an internal observer. This matches the described pattern exactly: plausible narrative in place of inaccessible mechanism.
